title: A Sudden Medical Bill
scenario: A family member needs a small procedure costing ₹35,000. It's not covered conveniently. How do you pay for it?

choices.label: Swipe a credit card and carry it
choices.lesson: Funding an emergency on high-interest credit turns a one-time shock into months of expensive debt — exactly what an emergency fund and insurance exist to prevent.

choices.label: Use the emergency fund
choices.lesson: This is what an emergency fund is for. Using it hurts, but it spares you high-interest debt — and you simply rebuild the fund afterwards.

concept: Emergency fund vs debt in a crunch
